title: Armored spacesuit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Star_Wars_RPG_Armored_Spacesuit.jpg|thumb|An illustration of an armored spacesuit.]]
Though bulky, the '''armored spacesuit''' could support a wearer within the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] or another type of hostile environment for up to ten [[Standard day/Legends|days]] at a time. The armored spacesuit cost ten thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and weighed forty-five [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]]. Unarmored versions were also available, however they only provided life support.<ref name="RPG-Core">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''</ref>

{{Tech-stub}}
